zh.St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Ken: 英國肯特哈德洛福聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Haudlo於1224年出生在英國肯特波斯特林。他和Cecily Handlo至少有1個兒子。他去世於1306年在英國肯特哈德洛福享年82歲，埋葬在英國肯特哈德洛福聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Haudlo was born in 1224, in Postling, Kent, England. He had at least 1 son with Cecily Handlo. He died in 1306, in Hadlow, Kent, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Kent, England.

ja.Hadlow, Kent, England: イギリスケントハドロウ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Haudloは1224年にイギリスケントポストリングで生まれた。彼はCecily Handloとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1306年にイギリスケントハドロウで82歳で死去し，イギリスケントハドロウスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary The Virgin's Church, Hadlow, Ken: 영국 켄트 하들로 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas de Haudlo(은)는 1224년 영국 켄트 포스틀링에서 태어났다. 그는 Cecily Handlo(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1306년 영국 켄트 하들로에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 하들로 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.
